message:
fix: NOMKSTREAM empty stream, version const, RESP parser boundary

- NOMKSTREAM: use store.exists() instead of xlen/xlast_id to correctly
  handle existing empty streams (created via XGROUP CREATE MKSTREAM)
- Centralize REDIS_COMPAT_VERSION ("7.2.0") as single const in fr-store,
  used by fr-command INFO, fr-runtime HELLO and RDB aux fields
- Fix RESP parser read_line off-by-one: \r\n straddling MAX_LINE_LENGTH
  boundary was incorrectly rejected as LineTooLong

Closes: frankenredis-jkk, frankenredis-jzs, frankenredis-txo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
